theme: shortest gene that grows the creature
title: Morphogen Golf
innovation_hook: The image is the fixpoint of an unknown recursion; compression = discovering the generative rule, not tracing the outline.
strategies: trivial: emit the developed transcript verbatim (trace the outline) -> gene = |T|
greedy: RePair grammar compression -> SLP of size ~ n = log|T| (a rule per level)
strong: recover the uniform morphism via automatic-sequence unfolding -> O(1)-token L-system
